Avatar Trainer Step 3 - Live Visual Upgrade \(Holographic UI + VRM Viewer\)

## Summary
Implemented full Step 3 VRM avatar viewer with Three.js + @pixiv/three-vrm, holographic home card, polished Step 2 guide, and simplified Step 1.

## Changes
- **New**: vrm-viewer-research.md — technology stack documentation
- **New**: vrm-viewer.js — ES module for Three.js + VRM initialization, pose control, camera presets, lighting

- **index.html**: Wrapped content-placeholder in holographic .home-welcome-card
- **step1.html**: Simplified to single filler card \(avatar customization → Step 3\)
- **step2.html**: Added golden "HOT GUY HAS YOUR BACK QUICK GUIDE" title bar above tutorial

## Features
- Live 3D avatar spinning with OrbitControls mouse drag
- Pose sliders: head, arm, leg bone rotation
- Camera presets: Front, Side, Top views + FOV control
- Lighting: color picker + intensity slider
- Holographic welcome card with rotating gradient animation
- Tutorial with integrated resource links
- Full dark/light theme support

✓ Mouse drag rotates avatar
✓ Pose sliders affect bone rotations
✓ Camera controls change view angles
✓ Light controls affect scene rendering

✓ Resources links embedded in tutorial steps
